incorrect.source_says: The core protocols compiled in this review (Huch/Broutier/Nuciforo, Table 2) are adult-tissue / adult-stem-cell (ASC) derived from LGR5+ cholangiocytes and primary hepatocytes; iPSC is described only as an ALTERNATIVE source, not the primary source cell.
incorrect.evidence_quote: The first experiments that enabled the development of organoids were based on the isolation, from murine intestinal epithelium, of single leucine-rich repeat-containing G-protein-coupled receptors 5 (LGR5) positive adult stem cell ... ESCs and iPSCs are alternative sources for the in vitro generation of organoid models

incorrect.extracted: ROCKi listed as only media supplement; TNF-a placed under signaling_factors with quote '100 ng/mL TNF-a' but concentration field left null
incorrect.source_says: hepatocytes growth was aided by the addition of 100 ng/mL TNF-a; concentration is explicitly stated and should be captured
incorrect.evidence_quote: the addition of 100 ng/mL TNF-α to the hep-orgs culture medium

incorrect.extracted: EGF, HGF, ROCKi extracted with concentration=null
incorrect.source_says: Table 2 gives explicit concentrations: EGF 50 ng/mL, HGF 25 ng/mL, Y-27632 (ROCKi) 10 uM. Extractor ignored Table 2 entirely.
incorrect.evidence_quote: EGF 50 ng/mL HGF 25 ng/mL ... Y-27632 (ROCKi) 10 µM Rho-kinase inhibitor, it blocks apoptosis process.
incorrect.source_loc: Table 2 (Components of liver organoids expansion medium)

recall_misses.source_says: B-27 serum-free supplement at 1:50 dilution, core expansion-medium component
recall_misses.evidence_quote: B-27 1:50 Serum-free supplement, without vitamin A, it increases differentiated cell vitality during long term expansion culture condition.
N-2 1:100 Serum-free supplement, it promotes neuronal primary cell cultures’ growth.
Nicotinammide 10 mM Anti-inflammatory agent, it controls cell metabolism, mitochondria functionality and energy production.
N-acetil-L-cisteine 1.25 mM Mucolytic agent, with cytoprotective, anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects

recall_misses.source_says: Forskolin 10 uM, cAMP agonist supporting long-term expansion (also named in prose as FSK)
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Forskolin 10 µM Diterpenes, agonist of cAMP pathway ... it supports long-term expansion of organoids.
recall_misses.source_loc: Table 2 (also methods_text §4: 'Forskolin (FSK), an activator of cyclic adenosine monophosphate (cAMP)')

recall_misses.source_says: A83-01 5 uM, TGF-beta signalling inhibitor for long-term expansion (named in prose as A8301)
recall_misses.evidence_quote: A83-01 5 µM TGF-β signalling inhibitor, it blocks the epithelial to mesenchimal transition TGF-β induced; it supports long-term expansion of organoids culture.
recall_misses.source_loc: Table 2 (also methods_text §4: 'the inhibitor of TGF-β signalling, A8301')

recall_misses.evidence_quote: [Leu 15 ]-Gastrin I 10 nM Essential for digestive system, gastrin stimulates the production of gastric acid from paretial cells and prolong the survival time of liver organoids.

recall_misses.source_says: FGF-10 100 ng/mL, mitogenic growth factor (distinct from FGF-19 which extractor captured)
recall_misses.evidence_quote: FGF-10 100 ng/mL Growth factors with mitogen effect, they promote cell proliferation, differentiation, and survival.
Noggin 100 ng/mL Bone morphogenic protein (BMP) inhibitor.

recall_misses.source_says: R-Spondin 1 was extracted but concentration (10%) from Table 2 was missed
recall_misses.evidence_quote: R-Spo1 10% Agonist of WNT/β-catenin and WNT/PCP pathways and ligand of LGR5 + receptor, it improves efficiency of organoids expansion.

recall_misses.source_says: Wnt3a was extracted but concentration (30%) from Table 2 was missed
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Wnt3a 30% Agonist of WNT pathway, it promotes stem cell LGR5 + proliferation, essential for organoids expansion.

recall_misses.source_says: Cultrex BME is a co-equal matrix option alongside Matrigel; only Matrigel was extracted
recall_misses.evidence_quote: it is necessary to provide the organoids with structural support using hydrogels such as Matrigel or Cultrex Basement Membrane Extract (BME)

recall_misses.item: Timeline: R-Spo1 and Wnt3a removed after 3 days
recall_misses.source_says: Protocol timeline detail: WNT activators withdrawn from healthy-organoid medium after 3 days; extraction timeline is empty
recall_misses.evidence_quote: R-Spo1 and Wnt3a were removed from medium of healthy organoids after 3 days of culture

recall_misses.item: Timeline: hepatocyte organoid division 50-75 days; cryopreservation 1-2 years
recall_misses.source_says: hep-orgs divide every 50-75 days from adult liver; organoids cryopreserved 1-2 years; extraction timeline/passaging empty
recall_misses.evidence_quote: just one hepatocyte out of every 100 produces hep-orgs, which proliferates more slowly and divides every 50–75 days when derived from the adult liver ... cryopreserve liver organoids for long-time periods that can reach as long as 1–2 years

recall_misses.item: iPSC differentiation factors: Activin A, BMP4, PI3Ki, Oncostatin M (concentrations not given in source)
recall_misses.source_says: Activin A, BMP4, PI3Ki and Oncostatin M named for iPSC route; extractor captured the first three but missed Oncostatin M
recall_misses.evidence_quote: To differentiate the hepatic progenitors into hepatocytes, HGF and Oncostatin M were also added in the medium

notes: Review article (Mauro et al., IJMS 2023) compiling liver organoid protocols from Huch/Broutier/Nuciforo labs; Table 2 is the authoritative expansion-medium recipe with full concentrations. Extracted factor NAMES from prose are largely correct (R-Spo1, Wnt3a, FGF-19, DAPT, dexamethasone, EGF, HGF, TNF-a 100 ng/mL, Activin A, BMP4, PI3Ki) and matrix=Matrigel is correct. But the extractor ignored Table 2 entirely, so it missed ~10 medium components AND every quantitative concentration (B-27 1:50, N-2 1:100, Nicotinamide 10 mM, NAC 1.25 mM, Forskolin 10 uM, Y-27632 10 uM, A83-01 5 uM, Gastrin 10 nM, FGF-10 100 ng/mL, EGF 50 ng/mL, HGF 25 ng/mL, Noggin 100 ng/mL, R-Spo1 10%, Wnt3a 30%). base_media=not_reported is defensible (the review never names a basal medium). source_cells=iPSC is misleading: the primary protocols are adult-stem-cell/LGR5+ derived, iPSC is only an alternative. timeline and passaging left empty despite extractable details. Multimodal=true (key culture facts live in tables). Verdict partial: good name-level recall from prose, poor table recall and near-total loss of concentrations.
